final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing minimalist avatar logo for a cross-platform content creator focused on new energy vehicles, digital gadgets, and lifestyle products.

Style/medium: minimalist logo mark
Composition: centered, symmetrical, scalable for circular crop
Subject: abstract tech-lifestyle emblem combining subtle EV and digital motifs (e.g., clean geometric shape suggesting connectivity and motion)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: neutral base with one accent (deep blue or teal, universally acceptable across CN/US/EU markets)
Materials/textures: flat vector, clean edges
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must work at 48x48px thumbnail size, must read clearly in both light and dark mode, monochrome version must function, avoid culturally sensitive symbols or colors
Avoid: red/green combinations (colorblind issues), religious symbols, national flags, hand gestures, animal motifs that carry negative connotations in specific cultures, overly complex details, gradients
